details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist (expected per governance contract). board/ exists at repo root but not under reports/.

moltbot/ directory exists with active code referencing Moltbot (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py contain Moltbot references. These were documented as removed but persist in code/config.
